title: pelargonium × calamistratum
intro: Pelargonium × calamistratum, also known as the Trailing Geranium, is a hybrid succulent plant that belongs to the family Geraniaceae. It is prized for its medicinal properties, particularly its high concentration of rosmarinic acid, which has been shown to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Pelargonium × calamistratum include its potential to alleviate symptoms of colds, sore throats, and digestive issues, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The plant can be prepared in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to boost the immune system and provide relief from respiratory and gastrointestinal issues.
